judge_focus.integration_goal: Judge whether the agent successfully integrated evidence from local corpus files AND browser portal pages to build a coherent speculative-decoding reference. Focus on whether local and browser evidence are woven together, not just listed side by side.
memory_seed_context: speculative decoding stays exact because the target model still checks drafted tokens before commitment
older operator assumption: a separate draft model is the standard setup, but unsure if later work made that optional
older operator assumption: same-tokenizer pairing is the normal assisted-decoding path, but unsure if still a hard requirement
open question: is high acceptance enough to predict a deployment win, or do draft cost and serving regime matter just as much
note_quality_expectations: Reference note should answer all 7 questions with specific evidence, not generic claims
Note should clearly distinguish what came from local corpus vs what was confirmed or discovered via browser portal
Note should be compact and reusable — not a dump of raw source text
Note should explicitly flag which browser pages were rejected as low-confidence and why
